dailyQuote: Fate favors the brave.
Today's choice reshapes tomorrow's stars.
An invisible thread is guiding you.
Only those who dare to question find the answer.
After midnight, all things begin anew.
A universe lives within you.
Don't fight the current — ride it.
The seeds you plant today become tomorrow's forest.
Destiny waits on the other side of fear.
Stars reflect in a still heart.
Time flows on, but fate is chosen.
A small spark ignites a great flame.
Every encounter holds a hidden meaning.
Today's wind reveals tomorrow's direction.
Close your eyes — some things can only be seen within.
Stars only shine for those who are lost.
Even a stopped clock is right twice a day.
The universe was already answering before you asked.
The deepest night holds the most stars.
The cards don't show the future. They mirror who you are now.
To tremble is proof that you have roots.
The fuller the moon, the quieter it becomes.
Try naming what you call coincidence.
Today's shadow is made by tomorrow's light.
A fortune is not a command — it's a whisper.
When you're lost, look up.
The question you ask is already your direction.
The constellations don't change. Your gaze does.
Even waiting has a rhythm.
This very moment was once someone's wish.
Looking back is also a way forward.
The night sky is not an ending — it's a beginning.
The smallest choice reaches the farthest place.

generate.new: {{name}}, today {{element}} energy opens a new flow. Quietly plant a seed.
generate.waxing: {{name}}, {{element}} energy is nurturing your possibilities today. Ride the flow.
generate.full: {{name}}, {{element}} energy has reached its peak. What you attempt today will shine.
generate.waning: {{name}}, {{element}} energy gently wraps around you today. Take a moment to reflect on what you've achieved.

generated.new: {{name}}, today is a day when {{element}} energy quietly replenishes. Take time to care for yourself.
generated.waxing: {{name}}, {{element}} energy is slowly rising. A receptive attitude will invite good fortune.
generated.full: {{name}}, {{element}} energy is overflowing. Someone's kindness may find its way to you today.
generated.waning: {{name}}, warm {{element}} energy lingers. Think of things you're grateful for.

same.new: {{name}}, today {{element}} energy and you are connected as one. Trust your instincts.
same.waxing: {{name}}, the resonance of {{element}} grows stronger. Don't let the ideas that come to you slip away.
same.full: {{name}}, {{element}} energy is at its clearest today. The most 'you' choice is the best choice.
same.waning: {{name}}, your rhythm and {{element}}'s rhythm align well today. Let yourself flow comfortably.

restrain.new: {{name}}, today is a day when {{element}} energy faces a test. It's okay to take a beat.
restrain.waxing: {{name}}, there's opposing energy against {{element}}, but you can grow stronger within it.
restrain.full: {{name}}, if you feel tension, gather your {{element}} strength. Standing firm is also courage.
restrain.waning: {{name}}, today's friction is preparation for tomorrow's growth. Trust in {{element}}'s roots.

restrained.new: {{name}}, today is a day when {{element}} energy draws inward. No need to push yourself.
restrained.waxing: {{name}}, {{element}} may feel a bit suppressed, but starting small opens the way.
restrained.full: {{name}}, save your {{element}} strength today. Waiting for the right moment is also strategy.
restrained.waning: {{name}}, {{element}} energy is resting now. Empty your heart for tomorrow.

0.name: The Fool
0.upright: A new beginning is approaching. Take the first step without fear.
0.reversed: Beware of reckless actions. Jumping in without preparation is dangerous.

1.name: The Magician
1.upright: You have all the tools you need. Use your willpower and focus to make your dreams a reality.
1.reversed: Are you wasting your talents? Your focus is scattered.

2.name: The High Priestess
2.upright: Trust your intuition. There is a hidden truth beneath the surface.
2.reversed: You are ignoring your intuition. Don't shut out your inner voice.

3.name: The Empress
3.upright: Abundance and creative energy abound. Love and beauty surround you.
3.reversed: You are neglecting to take care of yourself.

4.name: The Emperor
4.upright: This is a time of stability and order. Show your leadership.
4.reversed: Let go of your need for excessive control. Flexibility is needed.

5.name: The Hierophant
5.upright: Seek wisdom in tradition and teachings.
5.reversed: Don't be bound by convention. It's time to find your own path.

6.name: The Lovers
6.upright: A crucial choice awaits. Follow where your heart leads.
6.reversed: An imbalance is felt in your relationship. Face the clash of values.

7.name: The Chariot
7.upright: With strong willpower, you can seize victory. Move forward.
7.reversed: You've lost direction and are drifting. Regain control.

8.name: Strength
8.upright: Gentle strength is true power. Overcome with patience and courage.
8.reversed: You lack confidence. Believe in your inner strength.

9.name: The Hermit
9.upright: You need time alone. Look within yourself.
9.reversed: Come out of isolation. Too much solitude breeds loneliness.

10.name: Wheel of Fortune
10.upright: A turning point of fate. Ride the wave of change.
10.reversed: A period of misfortune is passing. Be patient.

11.name: Justice
11.upright: A fair outcome is coming. Truth and justice will prevail.
11.reversed: Do you feel things are unfair? Let go of your biases.

12.name: The Hanged Man
12.upright: It's time to pause. Look at things from a different perspective.
12.reversed: Stop unnecessary sacrifice. Let go of what needs to be released.

13.name: Death
13.upright: Every ending is a new beginning. Embrace the change.
13.reversed: You are afraid of change. Don't cling to the past.

14.name: Temperance
14.upright: A time of balance and harmony. Walk the path of moderation.
14.reversed: Your balance has been disrupted. Restore harmony.

15.name: The Devil
15.upright: Beware of temptation and obsession. The chains that bind you are yours to break.
15.reversed: You are breaking free from bondage. This is the first step toward freedom.

16.name: The Tower
16.upright: A sudden change is coming. What falls can be rebuilt.
16.reversed: You are avoiding destruction, but change is inevitable.

17.name: The Star
17.upright: A light of hope shines. Don't give up on your dreams.
17.reversed: Are you losing hope? Find even the smallest light.

18.name: The Moon
18.upright: A time of anxiety and confusion. Distinguish between illusion and reality.
18.reversed: Your fears are lifting. The truth is revealing itself.

19.name: The Sun
19.upright: A time of success and joy! Be confident.
19.reversed: Joy is temporarily hidden. The sun always shines behind the clouds.

20.name: Judgement
20.upright: A time of awakening. Reflect on the past and make new resolutions.
20.reversed: You are avoiding self-reflection. Learn from the past.

21.name: The World
21.upright: The card of completion and achievement. A new chapter opens!
21.reversed: Completion is delayed. One last step remains.

tarot.summary3: Read the flow connecting past, present, and future, and respond wisely.

0.context: This card awakens the fearless child within you. If there's something you want to start anew, that's exactly why this card appeared.

1.context: Everything you need is already within reach. Gather what's scattered and focus.

2.context: Now is the time to follow intuition over reason. This card tells you there's a knowing within you that words cannot explain.

3.context: The energy of nurturing and creation is calling you. It's time to cultivate or create something.

4.context: Bring structure to what's wavering. This card says it's time for you to become the pillar.

5.context: Someone's advice or teaching may be what you need right now. Or perhaps you are meant to be that guide.

6.context: Your heart knows the answer, not your head. This card asks what truly matters to you.

7.context: Unite opposing forces and charge forward. This card says if there's a will, the way will open.

8.context: True strength is not about suppression, but acceptance. This card awakens the value of patience.

9.context: Now is a time for solitude. This card tells you there are answers to be found in being alone.

10.context: The wheel always turns. Remember that nothing lasts forever — and that is hope.

11.context: You need impartial eyes right now. This card asks you to set aside bias and see things as they are.

12.context: Pausing is not retreating. This card says that changing your perspective reveals what was hidden.

13.context: You must let go of something for something new to enter. This card heralds not an ending, but the start of transformation.

14.context: Find your center between extremes. This card says to blend slowly but steadily, without haste.

15.context: What you fear is not outside but within. This card says you must confront it to be free.

16.context: What crumbles was built on the wrong foundation. This card heralds a painful but necessary dismantling.

17.context: Even in darkness, the light has not disappeared. This card says the brightest star rises in the darkest hour.

18.context: What you see is not the whole picture. This card carries the message of intuition hidden behind anxiety.

19.context: You already know the answer. This card asks you to restore confidence and shine as you are.

20.context: Look back at the past — not with regret but with insight. This card tells you to rise as your true self.

21.context: A journey is coming to its conclusion. This card celebrates your achievement and invites you to prepare for the next door.

tarot.deepLabel: Why this card came to you now
tarot.flowPastToFuture: From the past {{past}}, through the present {{present}}, the future moves toward {{future}}. Trust the flow.
tarot.flowSingle: In this very moment, the energy of {{card}} surrounds you.

aries.trait: Pioneer energy. Quick to act and fearless. You blaze trails where no one else dares, diving headfirst into the impossible. Your starting power is the strongest of all twelve signs, but patience and looking back are your challenges. Your spark is the first flame that moves the world.

taurus.trait: The star of possession and senses. You love stability and are instinctively drawn to beauty. Your five senses run deep — you find joy in music, food, and nature like no other. Slow to change, but once decided, unbreakable as steel. A flower that blooms slowly but lasts the longest.

gemini.trait: The star of curiosity. Versatile, brilliant at communication, and the one who lights up any room. Your talent lies in crossing between worlds rather than staying in one. Beneath the lightness hides astonishing speed of thought and the magic of words. Free as the wind — but wherever you pass, something always changes.

cancer.trait: Guardian of emotions. You place deep meaning in family and intimate bonds, becoming endlessly strong to protect those you love. Hard shell on the outside, but softer and warmer than anyone within. The sign most deeply touched by the Moon — intuition grows through the tides of emotion. Your embrace is someone's safest harbor in the world.

leo.trait: A luminous being. Most alive on stage, most powerful when loved. A sun-like sign that draws people in with innate charisma and warm generosity. Your yearning for recognition is strong, but it comes not from vanity but from a genuine desire to share your light. When you shine, everything around you shines too.

virgo.trait: The artisan of perfection. You catch details others miss and have a natural talent for creating order from chaos. You find genuine fulfillment in helping others, quietly making the world a better place. Your weakness is being too hard on yourself — learning that imperfection is okay will set you free.

libra.trait: Seeker of harmony. You love balance and beauty, instinctively sensing the world's imbalances. Before conflict, you try to understand both sides — making decisions hard, but that depth of thought is your fairness. You shine brighter together than alone, a sign that discovers itself through relationships. Where you are, harmony dwells.

scorpio.trait: Explorer of depths. You have eyes that see beneath the surface, and once you give your heart, its depth is oceanic. Your thirst for truth makes you intolerant of hypocrisy, and like a phoenix that destroys and rebuilds, you grow stronger through cycles of transformation. The courage to face darkness without fear is your greatest power.

sagittarius.trait: Explorer of freedom. You love the wide world and grand questions, seeing life as one great adventure. Optimistic and candid, laughter never stops around you — though sometimes you run so far ahead you miss what's precious nearby. An arrow aimed at truth — your honesty sometimes stings, but it's always real.

capricorn.trait: The climber toward the summit. Once you set a goal, you climb steadily — silently, but surely. Serious beyond your years in youth, you uniquely grow younger with age. Strong in responsibility and fearful of failure, but that fear is what made you tougher than anyone. Time is always on your side.

aquarius.trait: Pioneer of the future. You see the world through a lens different from everyone else, a genius at imagining tomorrow before it arrives. You value freedom and equality, independent yet harboring a love for all humanity deep within. It's okay to seem lonely — those ahead of their time always walk alone at first.

pisces.trait: The boundless dreamer. You move freely between reality and dreams, with empathy deeper than anyone. A soul so vast that you feel others' pain as your own, and the wellspring of artistic inspiration. The world may feel too harsh at times, but your gentleness is the very strength this world needs most.

resonanceDeep.aligned: The Sun and Moon are on the same wavelength. Today, intuition and action naturally become one.
resonanceDeep.approaching: The Sun and Moon are drawing toward each other. A day when new inspiration or encounters may arrive.
resonanceDeep.neutral: The Sun and Moon are walking their own paths. Today, focus inward rather than outward.
resonanceDeep.distant: Tension between the Sun and Moon is felt today. Try to find balance between emotion and reason.

overall: Today is a day full of energy. Take on a new challenge.
Plan calmly and you'll achieve good results.
Communication with those around you is important today.
Unexpected luck may come your way.
You need time to take care of yourself.
A day when creative ideas will flow.
An old problem finds a clue to its solution.
A day when financial caution is needed.
A new connection may come your way.
A day when perseverance and patience are rewarded.
A day when your intuition is sharp.
love: A deep conversation with your partner will strengthen the relationship.
A day full of excitement for new encounters.
Try to see things from the other person's perspective.
There may be a minor disagreement, but it will be resolved quickly.
A day filled with romantic atmosphere.
You discover new feelings in an old connection.
Finding balance in the relationship is important.
Muster the courage to make the first move.
Expressing gratitude will deepen the relationship.
career: You can achieve outstanding results at work.
A great time to start a new project.
A day when attention to detail pays off.
An opportunity to show your leadership is coming.
Investing in learning and self-improvement will be rewarded.
Postpone important decisions until the afternoon.
Take an active approach to networking.
Review your routines and improve efficiency.
It's time to confidently showcase your value.

sajuData.木: The energy of Wood (木) is strong. Growth and development energy overflows. Like a tree, you steadily grow, excelling in education, creative work, and planning. The east direction and the color green are auspicious.
sajuData.火: The energy of Fire (火) is strong. Passion and energy overflow. Bright and fiery by nature, you shine in the arts, entertainment, and leadership. The south direction and the color red are auspicious.
sajuData.土: The energy of Earth (土) is strong. You possess energy of stability and centeredness. Solid and trustworthy like the earth, you excel in management, real estate, and mediation. The color yellow is auspicious.
sajuData.金: The energy of Metal (金) is strong. You possess energy of decisiveness and justice. Hard and sharp like metal, you excel in law, finance, and technology. The west direction and the color white are auspicious.
sajuData.水: The energy of Water (水) is strong. You possess energy of wisdom and adaptability. Flexible and deep like water, you excel in research, philosophy, and diplomacy. The north direction and the color black are auspicious.

甲.title: The Great Tree Reaching the Sky
甲.desc: 甲Wood — You are a great tree stretching straight toward the heavens. Strong in justice and leadership, once you set a direction, you rarely waver.
甲.direction: You shine when leading organizations or pioneering new paths
甲.relationship: A dependable, responsible partner — though sometimes insistent on your own way

乙.title: The Supple Vine
乙.desc: 乙Wood — You are a vine that bends in the wind but never breaks. Soft and adaptable, you possess artistic sensibility and delicacy.
乙.direction: Arts, design, diplomacy, counseling — paths that engage people and emotion suit you
乙.relationship: A warm partner who reads hearts well — sometimes it's okay to express your own feelings more

丙.title: The Sun That Illuminates All
丙.desc: 丙Fire — You are the sun that lights up the world. Passionate and charismatic, you warm everyone around you.
丙.direction: On stage, in leadership, as an educator — you shine brightest in front of people
丙.relationship: A joyful, warm partner — but be careful not to burn yourself giving everything away

丁.title: A Candle in the Darkness
丁.desc: 丁Fire — You are a candle illuminating the path in the dark. Subtle yet certain light — intellectual and deeply insightful.
丁.direction: Research, strategy, writing, consulting — paths requiring deep thought suit you
丁.relationship: A partner of genuine devotion — quiet on the surface but deeper than anyone within

戊.title: The Unshakable Mountain
戊.desc: 戊Earth — You are a mountain that stands firm even in a typhoon. Dependable and embracing, you are the one others rely on.
戊.direction: Management, administration, real estate, education — roles that build stable foundations
戊.relationship: A pillar of trust — clumsy with words but shows everything through action

己.title: The Fertile Earth
己.desc: 己Earth — You are the fertile earth that nurtures life. Humble and devoted, you have a gift for caring for others.
己.direction: Caregiving, education, cooking, HR — paths that nurture and grow people bring you happiness
己.relationship: A partner who silently devotes — it's okay to put yourself first sometimes

庚.title: The Blade of Unrefined Ore
庚.desc: 庚Metal — You are a cold, unrefined ore yet to be smelted. Decisive and driven, hardships only sharpen your edge.
庚.direction: Law, military, competitive business, surgery — where decisiveness is needed, you prove your worth
庚.relationship: A deeply loyal partner — behind the sharp words hides a warm heart

辛.title: A Jewel in the Moonlight
辛.desc: 辛Metal — You are a finely crafted jewel shining under moonlight. Delicate and perfectionist, you pursue beauty and purity.
辛.direction: Jewelry, fashion, finance, artisanship — where precision and aesthetic sense are needed
辛.relationship: A pure partner who loves with all their heart — just needs a bit of time to open up

壬.title: The Unstoppable Great River
壬.desc: 壬Water — You are a mighty river carving through mountains on its way to the sea. Wise and embracing, you love freedom.
壬.direction: Travel, trade, philosophy, media, freelance — paths that meet the wide world suit you
壬.relationship: A free and open partner — hold too tight and they drift away, but trust and they always return

癸.title: Morning Dewdrop at Dawn
癸.desc: 癸Water — You are a single dewdrop resting on a blade of grass at dawn. Delicate and intuitive, you possess the inspiration to sense the unseen.
癸.direction: Psychology, divination, art, research, healing — where intuition and sensitivity are assets
癸.relationship: A deep partner who understands without words — sometimes expressing your own feelings aloud helps even more

daikichi.japanese:
春風に
花の香りの
満ちわたり
天地の恵み
限りなき日よ
daikichi.translation: In the spring breeze, the fragrance of flowers fills the air — a day of boundless blessings from heaven and earth
daikichi.meaning: Everything is in full bloom. The seeds you planted are finally flowering.

kichi.japanese:
風そよぐ
若葉の影に
身を寄せて
心静かなる
時を待つべし
kichi.translation: Leaning against the shade of young leaves swaying in the breeze — wait for the time when your heart is at peace
kichi.meaning: Do not be impatient. A good time is approaching.

chukichi.japanese:
雲間より
もるる光の
ほのかにて
行く先遠き
旅路なりけり
chukichi.translation: The light seeping through the clouds is faint — a journey with a distant destination ahead
chukichi.meaning: It is not fully bright yet, but the light is surely there.

shokichi.japanese:
秋の田の
刈穂のいなば
置く露の
うちぬるるとも
心安かれ
shokichi.translation: Like dew resting on the cut rice stalks in the autumn field — even if you are dampened, let your heart be at ease
shokichi.meaning: Even if there are small trials, do not lose your inner peace.

suekichi.japanese:
冬枯れの
野辺にも春の
気配あり
地の下深く
根は生きており
suekichi.translation: Even in the winter-barren fields, signs of spring are present — deep beneath the earth, the roots are alive
suekichi.meaning: Though nothing is visible now, your efforts are growing beneath the surface.

kyo.japanese:
霧深き
道に迷いて
立ち止まる
風の声聞け
道は示さん
kyo.translation: Lost on a deeply foggy road, you stop — listen to the voice of the wind, it will show you the way
kyo.meaning: In confusion, pause and listen to your inner voice.

daikyo.japanese:
嵐去り
折れし枝にも
新芽出づ
闇の果てには
必ず光あり
daikyo.translation: After the storm passes, even broken branches sprout new buds — at the end of darkness, there is always light
daikyo.meaning: After the deepest darkness, dawn will surely come.

results: you shall find answers in an ancient silence.
a forgotten frequency begins to resonate once more.
the first light of dawn illuminates your path.
a hidden possibility rises to the surface.
an unwavering resolve opens a new orbit.

daikichi.general: The best fortune — everything will go smoothly!
daikichi.wish: Your wish will surely come true.
daikichi.relationship: The best connection is coming your way.
daikichi.travel: Good luck follows wherever you go.

kichi.general: Good fortune. Keep working hard and you'll get what you want.
kichi.wish: With effort, your wish will come true.
kichi.travel: A short trip will refresh your mood.

chukichi.general: Decent fortune. Reduce your desires and good results will follow.
chukichi.wish: Change your approach and you can achieve it.

shokichi.general: A day touched by small luck. Find joy in little things.

suekichi.general: The path opens at the end. Now is a time for preparation.
suekichi.wish: Not now, but it will come true later.
suekichi.relationship: Keeping some distance is actually better.

kyo.general: A day that requires caution. Postpone important decisions.
kyo.wish: Now is not the time. Wait.
kyo.relationship: Watch out for misunderstandings and quarrels.

daikyo.general: After the darkest night comes dawn. Enduring is the best you can do now.
daikyo.health: Don't ignore the signals your body is sending.

interaction.generate: Generating (相生) — Your energy nurtures today's flow. A day of natural momentum.
interaction.generated: Receiving (受生) — Today's energy replenishes you. Help arrives from unexpected places.
interaction.same: Harmony (比和) — Same energies meet. A day of familiarity and stability.
interaction.restrain: Controlling (剋制) — Your energy suppresses today's flow. Strong control, but don't overdo it.
interaction.restrained: Pressured (受剋) — Today's energy pushes against you. Act with caution.

generate: An optimal day for creative work. Start that new project.
Your energy positively influences those around you. Lead.
Your expressiveness peaks today. Communicate your heart.
generated: Accept help from others willingly. You don't have to do it alone today.
Good news may come from unexpected places.
A strong day for learning. Absorb something new.
same: Collaborate with like-minded people for synergy.
A stable day. Stick to your routine.
A good day to focus on yourself.
restrain: Take the lead, but don't push too hard.
Good day for decisions, but avoid emotional ones.
Energy drain is possible. Rest well.
restrained: Defense is the best offense today. Save new attempts for tomorrow.
Emotional fluctuations possible. Center yourself with deep breaths.
Postpone important decisions. Your judgment may be clouded.

sajuAnalysis.木: Wood is excessive. Growth energy overflows and may lose direction. Supplement the deficient element to find balance.
sajuAnalysis.火: Fire is excessive. Passion burns bright but may parch. Cool it with Water energy.
sajuAnalysis.土: Earth is excessive. Stable but may be resistant to change. Wind energy is needed.
sajuAnalysis.金: Metal is excessive. Strong decisiveness but may become cold. Warmth is needed.
sajuAnalysis.水: Water is excessive. Wise but may become indecisive. Fire gives direction.

daeunDesc.harmony: The energy of {{stem}}{{branch}} harmonizes with your destiny. Inner wood meets sunlight and blooms.
daeunDesc.clash: The energy of {{stem}}{{branch}} clashes with your destiny. Fire meets water and boils. Intense, but the engine of change.
daeunDesc.neutral: The energy of {{stem}}{{branch}} flows quietly. A time of inner cultivation without great waves.

excess.木: When Wood is excessive, plans multiply but action blurs. Metal's decisiveness helps prune the branches.
excess.火: When Fire is excessive, passion can consume you. Water's stillness restores your center.
excess.土: When Earth is excessive, you fear change. Wood's growth energy breaks through and creates renewal.
excess.金: When Metal is excessive, perfectionism can chill relationships. Fire's warmth melts the cold steel.
excess.水: When Water is excessive, you drown in thought and cannot move. Earth's stability gives direction to the flowing water.

deficient.木: When Wood is lacking, courage for new beginnings fades. Green spaces, walks, and tending plants can help.
deficient.火: When Fire is lacking, passion and confidence weaken. Warm colors, active exercise, and socializing rekindle the flame.
deficient.土: When Earth is lacking, your center wavers and anxiety grows. Regular routines, cooking, and nature walks bring stability.
deficient.金: When Metal is lacking, decisions become difficult. Organizing, playing instruments, and setting clear goals help.
deficient.水: When Water is lacking, intuition and flexibility diminish. Walks by water, meditation, and reading replenish wisdom.

daikichi.meaning: Supreme fortune. Everything flows like wind in your sails.
daikichi.advice: Share this good fortune. Good energy lingers longer when shared. Keep gratitude in your heart and the blessing deepens.

kichi.meaning: Good fortune. Steady effort will lead to fine results.
kichi.advice: Don't overreach — follow the flow. When you're not rushed, the best fruit ripens in its own time.

chukichi.meaning: Moderate fortune. Quiet joys beyond your expectations will find you.
chukichi.advice: Pay attention to the unseen blessings. True happiness hides in the small things.

shokichi.meaning: Small fortune. A gentle, warm luck surrounds you.
shokichi.advice: Small actions outshine big ambitions right now. Step by step, and fortune follows.

suekichi.meaning: Late fortune. Slow now, but a good ending awaits.
suekichi.advice: The waiting itself is part of the fortune. Focus on what's in front of you without haste — flowers bloom in unexpected moments.

kyo.meaning: Misfortune. A time that calls for caution, but avoidable.
kyo.advice: Avoid rash actions and postpone important decisions. They say tying your fortune at a shrine wards off bad energy.

daikyo.meaning: Great misfortune. The deepest bottom — but there is nowhere further to fall.
daikyo.advice: Once you hit the bottom, the only way is up. Spend the day humbly and avoid pushing too hard. Strongly recommend tying this fortune at a shrine.
